{{Quote|I see three time winner Bozzie Baranta is back for another try.|[[Fodesinbeed Annodue/Legends|Fodesinbeed Annodue]]|audio=Fode-BozzieBaranta.flac|<ref name="EpI Racer" />}}
'''Bozzie Baranta''' was an [[Bozzie Baranta's species|alien]] [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] on [[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano's]] pit crew around the time of the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Baranta had [[Color/Legends|pink]] and tan skin, and blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. Eventually, Baranta became a [[Podracer (profession)/Legends|podracer]] himself.

==Biography==
===Early days===
Working as a mechanic for Gasgano, in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], this [[Bozzie Baranta's species|alien]] individual fostered dreams of becoming a podracer himself. He secretly practiced with the [[Ord Pedrovia/Legends|Ord Pedrovia]] until he felt he could at least hold his own on the Amateur circuit. At that point, he made his request to part ways with Gasgano. Once the [[Xexto/Legends|Xexto]] saw how he could race, Gasgano agreed to let him off the pit crew, and even had a hand in funding Baranta's campaign to buy a [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]].<ref name="guide" />

===Becoming a podracer===
After securing a [[Shelba 730 Razor]] podracer, Baranta painted the machine in bright colors such royal blue, [[silver]] and [[gold]] and began to live his dream.<ref name="guide" />

He performed quite well that he became the favorite in the track "[[Abyss (Ord Ibanna)|Abyss]]" in [[Ord Ibanna]]. He was known to let worry affect his piloting, but could be a dangerous opponent, due to his tendency to stop regularly during a race to make repairs. As such, he spent more to repair the podracer than he did to purchase it.<ref name="guide">[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>

==Skills and abilities==
Baranta's podracing impressed the likes of Gasgano.<ref name="guide" />

==Personality and traits==
Baranta was best known for worrying too much. He tended to stop in the pits too much, which normally kept him out the winners' circle.<ref name="guide" /> He had only won three times by 32 BBY. He spoke [[Huttese/Legends|Huttese]].<ref name="EpI Racer" />

==Equipment==
[[File:Shelba730Razor-EpisodeIRacer.png|thumb|right|Bozzie's podracer being worked on by [[DUM-series pit droid|pit droids]]]]
Baranta's ''Shelba 730 Razor [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]]'' was considered one of the most flashy, beautiful and elegant pod ships of the Tournaments. He considered it his pride and joy.<ref name="guide" /> His podracer had average acceleration and good response, but it had below average handling.<ref name="CWSE BB">{{CSWECite|1|79|Baranta, Bozzie}}</ref> He installed a top of the line repair-module on his podracer to make sure his podracer got all the attention. He ended up putting more money into repairing it then he did actually buying it.<ref name="guide" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|I hope Watto gave you a good deal for that junkpile.|Bozzie Baranta was voiced by Terence McGovern|translated=1|audio=BozzieBaranta-taunt.flac|<ref name="EpI Racer" />}}
Bozzie Baranta was first mentioned in the Baranta's voice in the ''[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (novelization)|Star Wars: Episode I film novelization]]'' He made his first full appearance in ''[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|Star Wars Episode I: Racer]]'', voiced by [[Terence McGovern]]. In early drafts of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']], there was a character named [[Bozzie Barada]].
